troubleshooting.title: Problem? Clic here 4 advice
troubleshooting.copied_to_clipboard: According to all known laws of aviation, there is no way a bee should be able to fly. Its wings are too small to get its fat little body off the ground. The bee, of course, flies anyway because bees don't care what humans think is impossible. Yellow, black. Yellow, black. Yellow, black. Yellow, black. Ooh, black and yellow! btw, the info is copied to ur clipbord. if u need help, u can share on Discord server
troubleshooting.chromium_tip: firefox is bad 4 openfront. u need to go to chrome or other chromium based
troubleshooting.hardware_acceleration_tip: put hardware acceleration on so dat u dont hav bad performens 👍
troubleshooting.gpu_tip: pls check if dats ur ekspenziv gpu
troubleshooting.battery_level: hau mu4 u have left of % in bateri

help_modal.action_enter: put bilding under white mouse ting
help_modal.action_coordinate_grid: choos if 2 show coordinates on grid on top of ur game or no
help_modal.action_attack_altclick: atak (wen da left buton on mouse open menu)
help_modal.action_emote: the menu that u can send faces and stuff to the other players idk
help_modal.action_center: mov ur screen 2 see da player in center
help_modal.action_zoom: muv ur camera 2 be closer/furder from the land
help_modal.action_move_camera: propel the camera in a direction
help_modal.action_ratio_change: make it so u send less/mor troops to THE FRONT wit every attack
help_modal.action_auto_upgrade: if u have bilding near wher u want 2 place new, its level will be upgrade!
help_modal.ui_section: wat u see on da game screen
help_modal.ui_your_team: u and ur frendz in the game:
help_modal.ui_leaderboard_desc: here u can se all of the most tryhard players in da game, how mu4 land they hav, their amount of shiny yellow stone and their fighter people. Wen u use show all the ting shows u all of da pipul in game. U can also hide da list btw by clicking hide
help_modal.ui_control_desc: da control panel thing has all of these wonderful stuff:
help_modal.ui_gold: Gold - How rich you are and how much Richer you get.
help_modal.ui_attack_ratio: atak ratio thing - how many fighter pipul u'll send wen you send atak. U can change it wit the slider. If u hav mor pipul dat atak ur future rightful land than da pipul dat defend ur present rightful land than less of ur atakers will put an end to their existence. If its the other way around, u loos mor trups. All of this stuff doesn't take efect beyond 2:1
help_modal.ui_events_desc: the latest news panel displays the latest stuff, request and letters from other player. These is example:
help_modal.ui_events_alliance: Make frend - u can become or not become frend with the 2 butons. 1 frend can send yelow stones and fighter people to other, but u cant atak frend. Presing on focus propels the camera 2 the person who want to be ur frend.
help_modal.ui_events_attack: Ataks - ataks that come and ataks u make can see here. Clik the letter 2 propel camera on top of atak, BOOM or floating water thing. U can send troops back 2 u when u click the brick-coloured X buton, BUT that will make 25% of those people be die. When u bring floating water thing back, it floats back 2 where it begin. BOOMS cant be retreat.
help_modal.ui_events_quickchat: quick letter - u can look sent and recieved letter here. U can send letter to another person by pushing left mouse buton on quick letter icon in info menu.
help_modal.ui_options_desc: all of this stuf can be found hiar:
help_modal.ui_playeroverlay: da panel that show all stuf about player
help_modal.radial_build: open da menu to build stuff.
help_modal.radial_info: open da menu tha you get un-important information.
help_modal.info_ally_panel: panel wit stuf about ur countri frends 🔥
